SELECT category FROM sales WHERE CAST(refunded AS REAL) / CAST(sale AS REAL) > 0.05;

SELECT customer_id, name, contract_type, auto_renew, last_payment_date, payment_fail_count FROM customers WHERE auto_renew = 1 AND last_payment_date >= date('now', '-N days') AND payment_fail_count >= 2;
